_meta.description: Axle Towing - Elliott Template Approval Workflow for GoHighLevel
instructions: 1. Go to GHL > Automation > Workflows > Create New Workflow
4. Add each step in order (see steps array)
5. Set workflow status to ACTIVE (this is an internal ops workflow)
6. Test with a test contact tagged 'needs-elliott-approval'
7. Verify Elliott receives the notification email at elliott@axletowing.com
_meta.purpose: Ensures all outreach templates (nurture campaigns, referral sequences, cold outreach) are reviewed and approved by Elliott before activation. Templates stay in DRAFT until Elliott tags the contact with 'elliott-approved'.
dependsOn: AI-7460 (Referral Partner Sequences - templates need approval)

workflow.name: Template Approval -- Elliott Review
workflow.description: Internal ops workflow. When a template batch is ready for review, tag the internal contact 'needs-elliott-approval'. Elliott receives a notification email with review instructions and a summary. He approves by tagging 'elliott-approved' or rejects by tagging 'elliott-revision-needed'.

steps.subject: ACTION REQUIRED: Outreach templates ready for your review
steps.body:
Hi Elliott,

A new batch of outreach templates is ready for your review before we activate them.

--- WHAT NEEDS REVIEW ---

Template Batch: {{contact.notes}}
Total Templates: See the attached summary below
Submitted: {{contact.date_created}}

--- HOW TO REVIEW ---

1. Open the template files shared with you (Google Drive link in your email or check GHL > Marketing > Templates)
2. Review each email/SMS for:
   - Accuracy of claims (response times, service areas, pricing)
   - Tone and professionalism
   - Legal compliance (no guarantees, proper disclaimers)
   - Contact info is correct (480-288-5526, axletowing.com)
3. If APPROVED: Reply to this email with "APPROVED" or text AI Acrobatics team
4. If CHANGES NEEDED: Reply with your specific edits or call (619) 509-0699

--- TEMPLATE CATEGORIES ---

- PM Nurture 21-Day Sequence (7 emails + 2 SMS)
- Referral Partner Sequences (6 partner types x 3 emails each)
- Cold Outreach Sequences
- Re-engagement Campaigns

--- IMPORTANT ---

- NO templates will be sent to real contacts until you approve
- All workflows are in DRAFT mode
- SMS messages are also blocked until A2P 10DLC registration completes
- You can request changes at any time -- we'll update and resubmit

Thanks,
AI Acrobatics Team
(619) 509-0699 | julian@aiacrobatics.com
steps.description: Notification email to Elliott with review instructions

steps.subject: GHL Templates Awaiting Your Approval
steps.body: New template batch submitted for review. Check your email for the full summary and review instructions.

if_true.subject: Templates APPROVED -- activating workflows
if_true.body:
Hi Elliott,

Thanks for reviewing the templates. They've been marked as approved and we'll begin activating the workflows.

Next steps:
1. Email workflows will be set to ACTIVE
2. SMS steps remain DISABLED until A2P 10DLC is confirmed
3. You'll receive a confirmation once workflows are live

If you need to pause anything, just reply to this email or text (619) 509-0699.

AI Acrobatics Team

if_false.subject: Friendly reminder: outreach templates still need your review
if_false.body:
Hi Elliott,

Just a quick reminder -- the outreach templates we submitted are still awaiting your review.

No templates will go out until you approve them, so there's no rush -- but we want to make sure they don't slip through the cracks.

Reply APPROVED to greenlight them, or let us know if you need changes.

Thanks,
AI Acrobatics Team
(619) 509-0699
if_false.description: Day 2 reminder if not yet approved

if_false.subject: Final reminder: templates need your sign-off
if_false.body:
Hi Elliott,

This is the final automated reminder about the outreach templates awaiting review.

Our team will follow up directly to make sure everything is on track. The templates will remain in DRAFT until we hear from you.

Reply APPROVED or call us at (619) 509-0699.

AI Acrobatics Team

stopConditions.description: Stop if approval request is cancelled

revisionWorkflow.name: Template Revision -- Elliott Feedback
revisionWorkflow.description: When Elliott tags 'elliott-revision-needed', notify the AI Acrobatics team to make changes and resubmit.

steps.subject: Template revision requested by Elliott
steps.body:
Elliott has requested changes to the outreach templates.

Check the contact notes in GHL for Elliott's specific feedback.

Action required:
1. Review Elliott's feedback
2. Update the template files
3. Resubmit by removing 'elliott-revision-needed' and adding 'needs-elliott-approval'

Contact: {{contact.notes}}
steps.description: Notify AI Acrobatics team of revision request

steps.subject: Got it -- we'll update the templates
steps.body:
Hi Elliott,

Thanks for the feedback. We'll make the requested changes and resubmit the templates for your review.

You'll receive a new review notification once the updates are ready.

AI Acrobatics Team
(619) 509-0699

verification.escalationTrigger: No response after 5 days -> approval-escalate tag
